 {"id":"bd-abyl","title":"demo_showcase: dashboard layout fallback (narrow)","description":"Implement a narrow terminal fallback layout (collapse sidebar / stack panels).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:52.679493487Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:10.518019854Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-abyl","depends_on_id":"bd-1xoj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:10.517989587Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-abyl","depends_on_id":"bd-2smc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:40:52.704817099Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":31,"issue_id":"bd-abyl","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Narrow-mode behavior

When width is below a threshold (e.g. < 80):
- collapse sidebar beneath main
- reduce table columns / abbreviate labels
- prefer single-column stacking over cramped two-column layout

## Acceptance criteria

- No panics due to zero-width regions.
- Narrow mode still looks intentional and readable.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:41:25Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-cisk","title":"demo_showcase snapshots: debug tools","description":"Add insta snapshot coverage for debug_tools output (pretty/inspect + traceback).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:26.212372214Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:19.830717662Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","snapshots","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-11zc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:12.481243908Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-1365","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:19.830681455Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-3fqt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:17.433057178Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:18:14.925073557Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-cisk","depends_on_id":"bd-yzr8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:26.227535266Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":86,"issue_id":"bd-cisk","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Snapshot contract

Snapshot `debug_tools` scene output (pretty/inspect + traceback) in no-color or ANSI-stripped mode.

Ensure traceback and inspect outputs are stable for a fixed seed/config.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:17:44Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-eb17","title":"Port rich.prompt/status/pager equivalents (interactive helpers)","description":"Implement the interactive helper layer from Python Rich.

Scope (Rust-idiomatic):
- Prompt: styled input with validation and defaults
- Status: spinner + message context manager
- Pager: send output through pager when available

Acceptance criteria:
- Cross-platform behavior (Unix + Windows) behind crossterm
- Unit tests for parsing/validation logic; integration tests for non-interactive fallback
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:39:10.981531934Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:13:58.940557462Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T22:13:58.940491378Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-eb17","depends_on_id":"bd-3c90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:39:47.247630806Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-gfe5","title":"demo_showcase: HTML export writer","description":"Implement HTML export writing (inline + optional external CSS) and print file paths.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:55.998345246Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:44.084750886Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","export","html"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-gfe5","depends_on_id":"bd-164e","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:56.014207744Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-gfe5","depends_on_id":"bd-86gp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:44.084712885Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":51,"issue_id":"bd-gfe5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## HTML modes

- Inline style output via `Console::export_html(false)`
- Optional external stylesheet mode (either use `export_html(true)` or post-process like `examples/e2e_export.rs`)

## Acceptance criteria

- Writes `demo_showcase.html` (and `demo_showcase.css` if externalized) into export dir.
- Prints a final panel with file paths and viewing instructions.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:45:17Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-hziq","title":"demo_showcase: interactive key handling (optional)","description":"Optional: handle keypresses in interactive mode (e.g., q to quit early) without breaking non-TTY runs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:41:02.634414681Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:12.835723208Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","interactive"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-hziq","depends_on_id":"bd-2smc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:41:02.646689582Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-hziq","depends_on_id":"bd-3fph","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:53:12.835697190Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":35,"issue_id":"bd-hziq","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Optional feature

If we add key handling, keep it minimal and safe:
- only enabled when interactive
- non-blocking polling (short timeout)
- `q` to quit early, `p` to pause (optional)

This is strictly “nice to have”; do not let it complicate core correctness.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:41:57Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-i1kt","title":"Port rich.emoji: emoji codes + Emoji renderable","description":"Implement Python Rich emoji support.

- Emoji code replacement in strings: :smile:, :smile-emoji:, :smile-text: (with variant selectors) when Console emoji is enabled.
- Provide an Emoji renderable/type similar to Python rich.emoji.Emoji.
- Use the same emoji name->unicode mapping as Python Rich (Rich 13.9.4 rich/_emoji_codes.py).

Acceptance criteria:
- Unit tests for replacement + variants + unknown code passthrough
- Console respects ConsoleBuilder::emoji(false)
- Conformance fixtures include at least one emoji-code case comparing against Python Rich
- Update docs (RICH_SPEC/FEATURE_PARITY/README if needed)
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:37:41.446947137Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T18:54:48.254446614Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T18:54:48.254382605Z","close_reason":"Completed: emoji codes + Emoji renderable + conformance fixture (6b45c59)","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-i1kt","depends_on_id":"bd-3c90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:38:14.440550508Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
